Berkeley Hills, CA

A one-of-a-kind estate with Bay views, a renovated ADU, and over 12,000 sq ft of land

5Bedrooms
4Bathrooms
3,348Sq Ft
2Parcels
1939Built

Beyond a private entrance, a serene courtyard unfolds into a light-filled split-level home with vaulted beamed ceilings, a chef's kitchen, sweeping Bay views from two expansive decks, and a fully renovated ADU with its own entrance and vista. Minutes from Tilden Park, BART, and downtown Berkeley.

Schedule a Private Showing
The ADU — 1162 Miller

A home within a home

The renovated accessory dwelling unit sits on its own parcel and opens extraordinary possibilities — multigenerational living, rental income, a private guest house, or a dedicated workspace. It has its own entrance, its own deck with Bay views, and its own vaulted wood-ceiling interior.

As part of the sale, the seller would like to include 1162 Miller which contains the gorgeously remodeled ADU structure. Call the listing agents for details.

Property Features

Everything the discerning buyer is looking for

Interior

  • Vaulted beamed ceilings
  • Hardwood floors throughout
  • Chef's kitchen, quartz counters

  • Two expansive decks with Bay views
  • Renovated ADU, own entrance + deck

  • Fruit trees
  • 12,500 sq ft across 2 parcels

Practical

  • BESO Energy Score: 5
